parameters.name: case_data
parameters.value: {'api_name': '获取待申诉列表', 'path': '/api/products/admin/appeals/', 'method': 'GET', 'content_type': 'application/json', 'auth_required': True, 'auth_type': 'admin', 'headers': {'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36', 'Accept': 'application/json, text/plain, */*', 'Accept-Language': 'zh-CN,zh;q=0.9', 'X-CSRFToken': 'Qude8lFDdohMJxC0f3tOpC8OiXu3Imqn8l9YUXqEhSIBQlMwwl4vZCnR1OCzO4VJ'}, 'module': 'admin', 'source_file': 'appeal_list.yaml', 'id': 'TC-ADMIN-019-4', 'name': '验证申诉数据完整性', 'description': '验证返回的申诉数据包含所有必要字段', 'data': {}, 'path_params': {}, 'query_params': {}, 'files': {}, 'expected': {'status_code': 200, 'check_points': ['isinstance(resp_json, list)', 'len(resp_json) > 0', "'id' in resp_json[0] and isinstance(resp_json[0]['id'], int)", "'product' in resp_json[0] and isinstance(resp_json[0]['product'], int)", "'buyer' in resp_json[0] and isinstance(resp_json[0]['buyer'], int)", "'seller' in resp_json[0] and isinstance(resp_json[0]['seller'], int)", "'received_item' in resp_json[0] and resp_json[0]['received_item'] in ['yes', 'no']", "'description_match' in resp_json[0] and resp_json[0]['description_match'] in ['yes', 'no']", "'service_attitude' in resp_json[0] and resp_json[0]['service_attitude'] in ['yes', 'no']", "'appeal_content' in resp_json[0] and isinstance(resp_json[0]['appeal_content'], str)", "'appeal_status' in resp_json[0] and isinstance(resp_json[0]['appeal_status'], str)", "'appeal_status_display' in resp_json[0] and isinstance(resp_json[0]['appeal_status_display'], str)"]}, 'setup': [], 'teardown': [], 'tags': ['regression', 'p1', '管理员', '数据验证']}
